staPwRule1: When setting a new password, please follow these rules:
staPwRule2: • The new password must match in both fields.
staPwRule3: • The password must be at least 10 characters long and include letters, numbers, and special characters.
staPwRule4: • The password cannot include your user ID.
staPwRule6: • You cannot use the same character 3 or more times consecutively.
staPwRule7: • The new password cannot be the same as your current password.
staPwRule9: • Users are responsible for the secure use of their password.
staPwRule10: • The password must be changed every 3 months.
staPwRule11: Setting a strong password helps keep your account secure.
